'''Rabutz''' was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solem]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He worked as shoemaker in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[G'ai Solem]] and was a contact of a resistance movement against the planetary [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Malvander Bren]].

{{Char-stub}}
